_comment: Fill one of `orcid` OR `openalex_author_id` (orcid preferred). Edit `selected` to pick papers and order; match papers by DOI (preferred), openalex id, or arxiv id. Use `overrides` to add project-page / code / slides links to any paper. `extras` are papers OpenAlex hasn't indexed yet; add them here and they render alongside the OpenAlex list. `exclude_dois` hides specific papers (e.g. a preprint superseded by a published version). Changes here take effect on next page load; no workflow re-run needed.

extras.title: Statistics of natural scenes shape contextual modulation in the visual cortex
Dual-feature selectivity enables bidirectional coding in visual cortical neurons
